articles.excerpt: KATHMANDU, June 17: Authorities are moving into the final stage of preparations to open the Nagdhunga Naubise Tunnel for public use from Shrawan, which falls between mid-July and mid-August. Once operational, the tunnel is expected to ease long-standing traff…

articles.title: I am ready to die for Nigeria — Peter Obi
articles.excerpt:
Peter Obi, 2027 presidential candidate, declares his readiness to die for Nigeria, emphasizing ultimate sacrifice for leadership amid security crisis.

Read More: https://punchng.com/i-am-ready-to-die-for-nigeria-peter-obi/

articles.title: Breaking: Bill restricting late-term abortions fails to pass SA lower house
articles.excerpt: South Australia's lower house has voted against a bill to restrict access to abortions past 25 weeks. The legislation was defeated 36 votes to 9.
articles.content:
South Australias lower house has voted down a bill to restrict access to late-term abortion, after the legislation had earlier passed the upper house. 
The bill was defeated 36 votes to 9 votes shor…
articles.author: Thomas Kelsall

articles.title: Breaking: Bill restricting late-term abortions passes SA upper house
articles.excerpt: South Australia's upper house has passed a bill to restrict access to abortions past 25 weeks. The legislation passed 10 votes to 9 with the support of three newly-elected One Nation MPs.
articles.content:
South Australia's upper house has passed a bill to restrict access to late-term abortion.
The legislation passed 10 votes to 9 on Wednesday afternoon with the support of three newly-elected One Nati…
